variants.text: I don't talk to anyone who hasn't earned a VIP pass. Come back when you've impressed the DJ.

Sit down. Do you know why those doors are locked? ARPU. Average Revenue Per User. If you can't leave, you spend. But you... you've been doing everything but spending. I've been watching you on the monitors.

options.text: [Push back] I just need to leave.
[Listen] What do you want from me?

offer.text: You've caused quite a stir tonight, kid. Relax. The night is young. Have a drink with me before you head out into the cold.

options.text: No thanks, I'm in a hurry.

drinkBranch.text:
[FADE TO BLACK]

Everything went fuzzy. You woke up at 3:00 AM on the office sofa. The deadline is gone. You failed.

jobBranch.text: Direct. I like that. Honestly, probably for the best. I usually keep that bottle for people who don't know when to leave. I need a Floor Manager. Someone who can handle the chaos. Stay here, run the floor, and I'll double whatever your future career pays.

options.text: I have to get out. Immediately.

averageEnding.text: You become the new Floor Manager. You have money, but your degree is abandoned.

successEnding.text: The Owner respects the hustle and hands you the keys. You burst out the doors.
